build.buildCommand: .venv/bin/python manage.py cotton_ui_sources && npm install && npx @tailwindcss/cli -i app.css -o ./docs_project/static/app.css --minify

deploy.startCommand: python manage.py migrate && python manage.py collectstatic --noinput --ignore 'cotton-ui.css' --ignore 'cotton-ui.tokens.css' --ignore 'cotton-ui.min.js' --ignore 'cotton-ui.min.js.map' && gunicorn docs_project.wsgi --bind 0.0.0.0:${PORT:-8000}
